description: AVG returns NULL on empty set and produces a numeric/decimal type

columns.name: avg_price
columns.note: AVG returns numeric type and NULL on empty set

name: avg_nullable
query_sql:
-- @name AvgProductPrice
-- @returns :one
SELECT AVG(price) AS avg_price FROM products
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE products (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, price INTEGER NOT NULL, description TEXT, category TEXT NOT NULL)

sqlc_comparison.scythe_improvement: scythe correctly infers that AVG returns NULL on empty sets and widens the type to numeric/Decimal
sqlc_comparison.sqlc_behavior: sqlc may mark AVG result as non-nullable when the input column is NOT NULL
